provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, portrait head and shoulders, lean angular man in his early thirties, short dark hair with early grey at temples, circles under eyes from poor sleep, faded charcoal grey flight jacket with removed insignia outline, muted blue undershirt at collar, harsh flickering yellow-white industrial station lighting from above, quiet anger visible in jaw tension, guarded watchfulness, the face of someone scanning a rough station crowd, isolated on plain dark background

identity.scene_function: Kael under harsh Freeport lighting — proves identity persists across lighting conditions
identity.variant_constraint: same face and costume, different lighting — Freeport harsh yellow vs anchor neutral
